debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

failed_attempts:
apply propext; apply Iff.intro
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = n; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    unfold beq at h; generalize hn : w - 1 = n at h
    suffices ∀ j, j ≤ n → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) by
      simpa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] using this (w - 1 - i) (hn ▸ Nat.sub_le ..)
    induction n <;> simp [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true] at h
    · intro j hj; simp [Nat.le_zero.mp hj] at *; exact h
    · intro j hj; cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hj
      · simp [*]; exact h.1
      · apply ih h.2; exact h.2

have h_go : ∀ k, beq.go x y k = true ↔ ∀ i, i ≤ k → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go, Bool.beq_eq_true_iff]
      exact ⟨fun h i hi => by simp [Nat.le_zero_eq] at hi; subst hi; exact h, fun h => h 0 (Nat.le_refl _)⟩
    | succ k ih =>
      simp [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, Bool.beq_eq_true_iff, ih]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ i hi
        if h : i = k + 1 then subst h; exact h1
        else exact h2 i (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hi h))
      · intro h; exact ⟨h _ (Nat.le_refl _), fun i hi => h i (Nat.le_step hi)⟩
  apply propext; rw [beq, Bool.coe_iff_eq_true, h_go]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl i _; rfl
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    specialize h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] at h

  · rintro rfl; induction w - 1 <;> simp [beq, beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    generalize hn : w - 1 = n at h
    have : ∀ j ≤ n, x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by

        if heq : j = n + 1 then subst heq; exact h.1
        else exact ih h.2 j (Nat.le_of_le_of_ne hj heq)
    specialize this (w - 1 - i) (by rw [← hn]; apply Nat.sub_le)

    · intro h

      have : ∀ n, beq.go (w + 1) x y n = true → ∀ k, k ≤ n → x.getLsbD (w - k) = y.getLsbD (w - k) := by
        intro n hg k hk
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp [beq.go] at hg
          simp [Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hk, hg]
        | succ n ih =>
          simp [beq.go] at hg
          cases Nat.of_le_succ hk
          · exact hg.1
          · exact ih hg.2 ‹_›
      intro i hi

      rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hi)] at this

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  have h_go : ∀ n, beq.go w x y n = true ↔ ∀ i ≤ n, x.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) := by
    intro n; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
    rename_i n ih; rw [Bool.and_eq_true, ih]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ i hi; rcases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hi with rfl | hlt
      · exact h1
      · apply h2; apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ; assumption
    · intro h; exact ⟨h _ (Nat.le_refl _), fun i hi => h _ (Nat.le_step hi)⟩
  rw [beq, h_go]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl i _; rfl
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    specialize h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hi)] at h

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = n

  · intro h

    specialize this (n - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)

rw [Bool.eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl
    generalize w - 1 = n
    induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h
    rw [self_eq_bb x, self_eq_bb y]
    congr; funext i
    have h_lemma : ∀ m, beq.go x y m = true → ∀ j, w - 1 - m ≤ j → j ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
      intro m hm j hlo hhi
      induction m generalizing j with
      | zero =>
        simp [beq.go] at hm
        have : j = w - 1 := Nat.le_antisymm hhi hlo
        simp [this, hm]
      | succ m ih =>
        simp [beq.go] at hm
        by_cases heq : j = w - 1 - (m + 1)
        · simp [heq, hm.1]
        · apply ih hm.2
          · have : w - 1 - (m + 1) < j := Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hlo (Ne.symm heq)
            rw [Nat.sub_add_eq, Nat.sub_succ] at this
            if h0 : w - 1 - m = 0 then rw [h0]; apply Nat.zero_le
            else
              rw [←Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0)]
              exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt this
          · exact hhi
    apply h_lemma (w - 1) h i.val
    · rw [Nat.sub_self]; apply Nat.zero_le
    · apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
      rw [←Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos]
      exact i.isLt
      intro hw; rw [hw] at i; exact Nat.not_lt_zero _ i.isLt

cases w with
  | zero =>
    simp only [beq, beq.go, Bool.and_self, Bool.decide_eq_true, eq_iff_iff, true_iff]
    rfl
  | succ n =>
    rw [eq_iff_iff]
    constructor
    · rintro rfl; unfold beq; simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel]; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
    · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
      unfold beq at h; simp only [Nat.add_sub_cancel] at h
      have : ∀ k, beq.go (n + 1) x y k → ∀ j, n - k ≤ j → j ≤ n → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
        intro k hk j h1 h2; induction k generalizing j <;> simp [beq.go] at hk
        · simp at h1; have := Nat.le_antisymm h2 h1; subst this; exact hk
        · cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le h1 with
          | inl e => subst e; exact hk.1
          | inr l =>
            apply ih hk.2 _ h2
            rw [Nat.sub_succ] at l
            match Nat.eq_zero_or_pos (n - k) with
            | .inl z => rw [z]; apply Nat.zero_le
            | .inr p => rw [←Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos p]; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt l
      exact this n h i (by rw [Nat.sub_self]; apply Nat.zero_le) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hi)

rw [Bool.eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = k; induction k <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    unfold beq at h; generalize hk : w - 1 = k at h
    have : w - 1 - k ≤ i := by rw [←hk, Nat.sub_self]; exact Nat.zero_le _
    induction k generalizing i with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      have : i = w - 1 := Nat.le_antisymm (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi) this
      subst this; exact h
    | succ k ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      if heq : i = w - 1 - (k + 1) then subst heq; exact h.1
      else
        apply ih h.2
        have : w - 1 - (k + 1) < i := Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm heq)
        rw [← Nat.sub_sub] at this
        if z : w - 1 - k = 0 then rw [z]; exact Nat.zero_le _
        else
          have := Nat.succ_le_of_lt this
          rw [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero z)] at this
          exact this

        else exact ih hk.2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hj₁ (Ne.symm h))) hj₂
    exact this n h i (by rw [Nat.sub_self]; apply Nat.zero_le) (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)

  constructor

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h; subst h
    unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = n
    induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h
    apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i hi
    unfold beq at h
    have : i ≤ w - 1 := Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hi
    let k := w - 1 - i
    have hk : k ≤ w - 1 := Nat.sub_le _ _
    have h_idx : w - 1 - k = i := Nat.sub_sub_self this
    generalize hn : w - 1 = n at h hk
    rw [← h_idx]
    clear h_idx this i hi
    induction n generalizing k with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      have : k = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hk
      subst this; exact h
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      by_cases hk' : k = n + 1
      · subst hk'; exact h.1
      · apply ih h.2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hk hk')

apply propext
  constructor
  · rintro rfl
    suffices ∀ n, beq.go _ x x n by apply this

  · intro h

    intro i
    have : ∀ k j, beq.go _ x y k → j ≤ k → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
      intro k j hk hj; induction k generalizing j with
      | zero => simp [beq.go] at hk; cases Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hj; exact hk
      | succ k ih =>

        if h' : j = k + 1 then subst j; exact hk.1
        else exact ih hk.2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hj h'))
    specialize this (w - 1) (w - 1 - i) h (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt i.isLt)] at this

      intro hk j h1 h2

        · subst j; exact hk.1
        · exact ih hk.2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hj hjk))
    specialize h_go (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i)
    have hle : w - 1 - i ≤ w - 1 := Nat.sub_le _ _
    have heq : w - 1 - (w - 1 - i) = i := Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.pred_le_pred (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hi))
    rw [heq] at h_go
    exact h_go hle

apply propext; constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = n; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i
    if hi : i < w then
      have : ∀ n j, j ≤ n → beq.go w x y n → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
        intro n j hj; induction n generalizing j with
        | zero => simp [beq.go]; intro h; cases Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hj; exact h
        | succ n ih =>
          simp [beq.go]; intro ⟨l, r⟩
          cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hj with
          | inl e => subst e; exact l
          | inr e => exact ih _ (Nat.le_of_lt_succ e) r
      specialize this (w - 1) (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _) h
      rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] at this
    else simp [BitVec.getLsbD_ge _ _ (Nat.le_of_not_lt hi)]

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl
    unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = n
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · intro h
    rw [self_eq_bb x, self_eq_bb y]
    congr
    funext i _
    by_cases hi : i < w
    · have h_go : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k = true → (w - 1) - k ≤ i → i ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD i = y.getLsbD i := by
        intro k
        induction k generalizing i with
        | zero =>
          intro hk h_le _
          simp [beq.go] at hk
          rw [← hk, Nat.sub_zero] at h_le ⊢
          congr
          apply Nat.le_antisymm ‹_› h_le
        | succ k ih =>
          intro hk h_le h_ge
          simp [beq.go] at hk
          have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hk
          by_cases h_eq : i = (w - 1) - (k + 1)
          · rw [h_eq]; simp [h1]
          · apply ih h2 _ h_ge
            match h_sub : (w - 1) - k with
            | 0 => exact Nat.zero_le _
            | m + 1 =>
              rw [h_sub] at h_le
              rw [← Nat.pred_eq_sub_one, h_sub, Nat.pred_succ] at h_eq h_le
              exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne h_le (Ne.symm h_eq))
      apply h_go (w - 1) h (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)
    · simp [getLsbD, hi]

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  have go_spec (k : Nat) : beq.go w x y k = true ↔ ∀ i, i ≤ k → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) := by
    induction k with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]; rfl
    | succ k ih =>
      simp [beq.go, ih]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ i hi
        cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hi with
        | inl e => subst e; exact h1
        | inr l => exact h2 i (Nat.le_of_lt_succ l)
      · intro h
        exact ⟨h _ (Nat.le_refl _), fun i hi => h i (Nat.le_step hi)⟩
  simp [beq]
  rw [go_spec]
  constructor
  · intro h i _; rw [h]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i hi
    have le : i ≤ w - 1 := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le hi
    specialize h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self le] at h

rw [eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl; induction w - 1 <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    have : ∀ k, beq.go x y w k → ∀ j, w - 1 - k ≤ j → j ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
      intro k; induction k with
      | zero => simp [beq.go]; intro h j l r; rwa [Nat.le_antisymm r l]
      | succ k ih =>
        simp [beq.go]; rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ j l r
        if e : j = w - 1 - (k + 1) then rwa [e]
        else apply ih h2 (by cases w - 1 - k <;> simp; apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne l (Ne.symm e))) r
    exact this _ h _ (by rw [Nat.sub_self]; exact Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)

have h_go : ∀ k, beq.go x y k = true ↔ ∀ j, j ≤ k → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
    intro k; induction k <;> simp [beq.go, *]
    · exact ⟨by rintro rfl _; rfl, by intro h; apply h 0 (Nat.le_refl _)⟩
    · apply Iff.intro
      · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩ j hj
        cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hj with
        | inl e => subst e; exact h1
        | inr l => exact h2 j (Nat.le_of_lt_succ l)
      · intro h; exact ⟨h _ (Nat.le_refl _), fun j hj => h j (Nat.le_step hj)⟩
  apply propext; constructor
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    rw [beq, h_go] at h
    specialize h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] at h
  · rintro rfl; rw [beq, h_go]; intros; rfl

rw [Bool.eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · rintro rfl; generalize w - 1 = n; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    unfold beq at h; generalize hn : w - 1 = n at h
    have : (w - 1) - n ≤ i ∧ i ≤ w - 1 := ⟨by subst hn; rw [Nat.sub_self]; apply Nat.zero_le, Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi⟩
    induction n generalizing i with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      have : i = w - 1 := Nat.le_antisymm this.2 (hn ▸ this.1)
      subst this; simp_all
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      if heq : i = (w - 1) - (n + 1) then
        subst heq; simp_all
      else
        apply ih h.2 ⟨_, this.2⟩
        rw [← Nat.succ_le_iff]
        apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
        apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne this.1 (Ne.symm heq)

apply propext; constructor
  · intro h; subst h
    suffices ∀ n, beq.go w x x n by apply this
    intro n; induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h
    rw [self_eq_bb x, self_eq_bb y]; congr; funext i _
    congr
    cases w with
    | zero => exact i.elim0
    | succ w =>
      have : ∀ n k, k ≤ n → beq.go (w+1) x y n → x.getLsbD (w - k) = y.getLsbD (w - k) := by
        intro n k hk hgo
        induction n generalizing k with
        | zero => simp [beq.go] at hgo; subst hk; exact hgo
        | succ n ih =>
          simp [beq.go] at hgo
          cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hk with
          | inl e => subst e; exact hgo.1
          | inr l => exact ih k (Nat.le_of_lt_succ l) hgo.2
      specialize this w (w - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _) h
      rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_of_lt_succ i.isLt)] at this

rw [eq_iff_iff, beq]
  have : ∀ n, beq.go x y n ↔ ∀ i ≤ n, x.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - i) := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]; exact ⟨fun h i hi => by simp [Nat.le_zero_eq hi, h], fun h => h 0 (Nat.le_refl _)⟩
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go, ih]
      refine ⟨fun ⟨h1, h2⟩ i hi => if h : i = n + 1 then by simp [h, h1] else h2 _ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hi h).le,
              fun h => ⟨h _ (Nat.le_refl _), fun i hi => h i (Nat.le_step hi)⟩⟩
  rw [this]
  constructor
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    rw [← Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)]
    apply h _ (Nat.sub_le_self _ _)
  · rintro rfl i _; rfl

apply propext; constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    suffices ∀ k, beq.go w x x k by exact this _
    intro k; induction k <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    unfold beq at h
    let rec lemma_go (k) (hk : beq.go w x y k) (j) (hj_lo : (w - 1) - k ≤ j) (hj_hi : j ≤ w - 1) : x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
      induction k with
      | zero =>
        simp [beq.go] at hk
        rw [Nat.le_antisymm hj_hi hj_lo]; simpa using hk
      | succ k ih =>
        simp [beq.go] at hk
        if heq : j = (w - 1) - (k + 1) then
          rw [heq]; simpa using hk.1
        else
          apply ih hk.2
          · match h : (w - 1) - k with
            | 0 => apply Nat.zero_le
            | n + 1 =>
              apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
              rw [← Nat.sub_sub, h]
              exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hj_lo (Ne.symm heq)
          · exact hj_hi
    apply lemma_go _ h _ (by rw [Nat.sub_self]; apply Nat.zero_le)
    apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; rw [Nat.add_comm]; apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt hi

rw [Bool.coe_iff_eq_true]
  apply propext; constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq; generalize w - 1 = n
    induction n <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h; apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i
    if hi : i < w then
      have H : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k → ∀ j ≤ k, x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
        intro k hk j hj; induction k <;> simp [beq.go] at hk
        · cases Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hj; exact hk
        · rcases hk with ⟨h1, h2⟩; cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hj
          · subst j; exact h1
          · exact ‹_› h2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ ‹_›)
      specialize H (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
      rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] at H
    else simp [getLsbD_ge _ _ (Nat.le_of_not_lt hi)]
